#  Reorder Revisions of a Drawing 
##  Background 
By default, drawing revisions are ordered based on the 'Drawing Date' that is entered when uploading drawings. The revisions for a drawing can be reordered while [reviewing drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/review-and-confirm-drawings), but they can also be reorganized at any time on the drawing's General Information page.
##  Things to Consider​ 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Prerequisites:**
    * Drawings must exist in the Drawings tool. See [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/upload-drawings).  



##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Info** next to the drawing of which you want to reorder revisions.
  3. In the 'Versions' section, click and hold over the **grip** (⁞⁞) icon and use a drag-and-drop operation to arrange the revisions into a new order.  
  
![Reorder Table Rows1](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6dc75127c88fd45347c0e597a7e39896/46536a1608c151397cdc8ec45ced69ce/reorder-table-rows1.png?fm=webp)  
  
_Note:_ The changes are saved automatically.
